en: Fireflies lit up the world as I fell asleep
ko: 내가 잠들 때 반딧불이 세상을 밝혀줬어

en: Cause they fill the open air
You'd think me rude but I would just stand and stare
ko: 무례하다고 생각하겠지만 나는 그냥 서서 바라볼 거야

en: I'd like to make myself believe
It's hard to say that I'd rather stay awake when I'm asleep
ko: 잠들어 있을 때 차라리 깨어 있고 싶다고 말하기 어려워

en: Cause everything is never as it seems
Cause I get a thousand hugs
As they try to teach me how to dance
ko: 그들이 나에게 춤추는 법을 가르쳐 주려고 할 때

en: A fox trot above my head
A sock hop beneath my bed
A disco ball is just hanging by a thread
